product.name: EMART Heavy Duty Backdrop Stand 10 x 12ft Photo Video Studio Adjustable Photography Background Support System Kit with Carry Bag
features: 【Sturdy Heavy Duty Backdrop Stand】Constructed from 100% aluminum,each tripod features a dual spring cushion system that absorbs impact and protects your equipment.The thickest tube diameter of the tripod for this photo backdrop stand kit is 1.4 inches, making it stable and suitable for both indoor and outdoor use.

【High Load-bearing Capacity Crossbar x4】Easily connect multiple crossbars to extend the width from 72 inch/6 ft to 144 inch/12 ft.With a strong load-bearing capacity of up to 35 lbs,these crossbars securely hold various thick backdrops such as green screen,banners,flower wall, balloons, drapes or backdrop curtains without easily sagging.

【Better Effect with Accessories 】This included 6 heavy-duty spring clamps (max opening: 2 inches) firmly grip photography backdrops on the backdrop frame, preventing slipping and keep surfaces smooth.Additionally, it is equipped with a high-quality nylon carrying bag, which is convenient for storage and transportation.

【Application for Multiple Scenarios】This photography backdrop stand kit is suitable forbirthday parties, prom decoration, video recording, portrait photography,and even large-scale events like wedding,photo booth, product display,trade shows and pet pictures—offering reliable performance wherever you go.

【Package Contents】This background stand backdrop set includes (2) x metal backdrop stands,(4) x crossbars, (6) x heavy-duty backdrop clamps,and (1) x portable carry bag—everything you need for a seamless setup without any tools required.
